metadata.significance: Foundation of Islamic prayer, recited in every rak'ah of the five daily prayers

translations.en_sahih: In the name of Allah, the Entirely Merciful, the Especially Merciful.
translations.en_yusufali: In the name of Allah, Most Gracious, Most Merciful.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dengan nama Allah, Yang Maha Pemurah, lagi Maha Mengasihani.

translations.en_sahih: [All] praise is [due] to Allah, Lord of the worlds -
translations.en_yusufali: Praise be to Allah, the Cherisher and Sustainer of the worlds;
translations.ms_basmeih: Segala puji tertentu bagi Allah, Tuhan yang memelihara dan mentadbirkan sekalian alam.

translations.en_sahih: The Entirely Merciful, the Especially Merciful,
translations.ms_basmeih: Yang Maha Pemurah, lagi Maha Mengasihani.

translations.en_sahih: Sovereign of the Day of Recompense.
translations.en_yusufali: Master of the Day of Judgment.
translations.ms_basmeih: Yang Menguasai pemerintahan hari Pembalasan (hari Akhirat).

translations.en_sahih: It is You we worship and You we ask for help.
translations.en_yusufali: Thee do we worship, and Thine aid we seek.
translations.ms_basmeih: Engkaulah sahaja (Ya Allah) Yang Kami sembah, dan kepada Engkaulah sahaja kami memohon pertolongan.

translations.en_sahih: Guide us to the straight path -

ayahs.arabic: صِرَٰطَ ٱلَّذِينَ أَنْعَمْتَ عَلَيْهِمْ غَيْرِ ٱلْمَغْضُوبِ عَلَيْهِمْ وَلَا ٱلضَّآلِّينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Sirata allatheena anAAamta AAalayhim ghayri almaghdoobi AAalayhim wala alddalleena

translations.en_sahih: The path of those upon whom You have bestowed favor, not of those who have evoked [Your] anger or of those who are astray.
translations.en_yusufali: The way of those on whom Thou hast bestowed Thy Grace, those whose (portion) is not wrath, and who go not astray.
translations.ms_basmeih: Iaitu jalan orang-orang yang Engkau telah kurniakan nikmat kepada mereka, bukan (jalan) orang-orang yang Engkau telah murkai, dan bukan pula (jalan) orang-orang yang sesat.
